utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am sorry .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: What are you doing here ? !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I ... I , came to fill your ice cube trays .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: What ? !

emotion_cause.span: 3_I ... I , came to fill your ice cube trays .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Umm , okay , okay , look .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I took this picture from your fridge .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , because I know that this is my Father .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , this is Frank Buffay and you are standing right there next to him .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Now , look I deserve to know where I came from .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All right ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So if you can help me find my Father then you should !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Otherwise , you are just mean !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So , just tell me the truth !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: All right , the man in the picture is Chuck Magioni .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: My Father is Chuck Magioni ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: No , no , that is just Chuck Magioni , I ... I sold him a house last year !

emotion_cause.span: 16_No , no , that is just Chuck Magioni

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: And I am very sorry , but I do not know where your Father is , and that is the truth .

emotion_cause.span: 17_I do not know where your Father is

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh .

emotion_cause.span: 17_I do not know where your Father is

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: But umm , you are right .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: I think that a person should know where they come from .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: Wh ... which is why I ah , ahh , okay .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: I am your mother .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Heh ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe Sr
utterances.text: You know I wanted to tell you yesterday , but I just , I kinda felt all floopy , and ...

emotion_cause.span: 24_I wanted to tell you yesterday , but I just , I kinda felt all floopy
